sources.title: Syoss official product page
sources.evidence: Official Syoss page names Syoss Intense Fullness Kraeftigendes Shampoo, lists GTIN 4015100860429, describes it for thin/weak hair, and says the 3% Niacinamide volume complex gives fine, weak hair more volume and fullness.

sources.title: Rossmann product listing
sources.evidence: Rossmann product URL resolves for GTIN 4015100860429 and is used as the German purchase link; current search listing surfaced the product as available online at 4.49 EUR. Plain curl is client-challenged, so Nick should re-check the retailer price in the browser during final review.

field_rationales.identifiers[0]: The official Syoss structured product data lists GTIN 4015100860429.
field_rationales.product.image_url: Finales Chaarlie-Produktbild freigegeben. Original review-app source type: review_app_source_search
field_rationales.product.price_eur: The Rossmann search listing surfaced 4.49 EUR for this GTIN; because the Rossmann page body is client-challenged from curl, this should be re-checked in-browser before approval.
field_rationales.product.clean_name: After separating brand and product line, the product type is Shampoo.
field_rationales.product.category_key: The submission category is shampoo and the official Syoss product page is a shampoo page.
field_rationales.product.product_line: The repeated range/variant signal is Intense Fullness; keeping it as product_line avoids duplicating the variant in clean_name.
field_rationales.product.affiliate_link: Rossmann is the German retailer page for GTIN 4015100860429 and is the best currently identified purchase link.
field_rationales.product.canonical_brand: The submitted brand and official source both use Syoss.
field_rationales.category_specs.scalp_route: Balanced is the package-level default route for the same reason as the row-level scalp_route.
field_rationales.product.purchase_link_status: The Rossmann URL returned HTTP 200 and the product appeared available in the search listing.
field_rationales.category_specs.cleansing_intensity: Regular is the package-level default intensity because the source positions the product as a standard volume shampoo.
field_rationales.category_specs.product_shampoo_specs: Specs are inferred from source positioning: fine/thin/weak hair and volume/fullness claims, with no dandruff, irritation, dry scalp, or oily/dehydrated scalp positioning.
Only fine hair is included because Syoss specifically targets thin/fine, weak hair.
Set to balanced as the neutral scalp route because sources do not claim a dry, oily, dandruff, flaky, or irritated scalp use case.
Set to normal because the product is hair-volume focused rather than scalp-condition focused.
Set to regular because the source does not make a clarifying claim or an explicit mild/gentle daily-cleansing claim.

review.notes: Prepared locally for Nick's final review. No Supabase approval, storage upload, or user notification has been run.
